action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 26's exploration on a 50-file validation subset showed that peak-normalizing each input waveform before enhance_batch (then rescaling afterward) yielded the highest local PESQ (2.8716 vs baseline 2.8637). All training/adapter attempts have failed to beat the pretrained MetricGAN+ test PESQ of 3.134. Analysis: Before committing an eval submission, I must verify whether the peak_norm gain holds on the full validation set (1157 files). If it does, I will update predict.py to apply this zero-risk preprocessing and submit eval. I will also inspect the pretrained model for an internal audio_normalizer to see if we can replicate SpeechBrain's native file-enhancement behavior exactly. Decision: Write and run a fast full-validation script comparing baseline and peak_norm. If peak_norm wins by >0.01 PESQ, update predict.py and submit eval in the next iteration.
